title: Mordis VI

{{Quote|My airspeeder might be built like a dung beetle, but it could survive an acid storm on Mordis VI.|Zam Wesell|<ref name="NEGVV" />}}
'''Mordis VI''' was a terrestrial astronomical object<ref name="NEGVV" /> located in the [[Mordis system/Legends|Mordis system]], a part of the [[Lambda sector/Legends|Lambda sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]] portion of<ref name="Trailing" /> the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="EAOC" /> [[Acid storm]]s were a weather phenomenon that occurred on Mordis VI's surface. The [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Zam Wesell/Legends|Zam Wesell]] once claimed that, due to it being designed for operation on wasteland [[Planet/Legends|worlds]] with thin, low-[[Oxygen/Legends|oxygen]], or corrosive [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmospheres]], her stolen [[Koro-2 all-environment exodrive airspeeder|''Koro''-2 all-environment exodrive airspeeder]] could withstand the effects of an [[Acid/Legends|acid]] storm on Mordis VI.<ref name="NEGVV" />

==Behind the scenes==
Mordis VI was mentioned in the [[2003]] reference book ''[[The New Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]'', which was authored by [[W. Haden Blackman]].<ref name="NEGVV" /> The [[StarWars.com]] [[Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion|Online Companion]] to the [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' later placed the Mordis [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Mordis VI, in grid square P-16.<ref name="EAOC" />

==Sources==
